problem: What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience?
hypothesis: Sleep-dependent memory consolidation in hippocampus may resolve What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 19 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
